case_title: JOSE MANUEL RODRIGUEZ VS. PEDRO GIL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, JOSE MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT GIL, PEDRO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CASA GUADALUPE GIL, JOSE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CASA GUADALUPE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, JOSE MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIL, PEDRO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CASA GUADALUPE GIL, JOSE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CASA GUADALUPE $28,406.05 PRINCIPAL, $537.14 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,167.69, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
